capabilities.name: Employee Management
capabilities.description: Manage employee records, personal and work information, categories, managers, and badges.
examples: Create a new employee linked to a user

capabilities.name: Department Structure
capabilities.description: Configure department hierarchy, managers, and employee assignments.

capabilities.name: Contracts
capabilities.description: Manage employee contracts, contract types, wages, working schedules, and statuses.
examples: Create a contract for a new hire
Set up working schedule on a contract

capabilities.name: Attendance
capabilities.description: Track employee attendance, check-in/check-out, overtime, and kiosk mode.

capabilities.name: Leaves & Time Off
capabilities.description: Configure leave types, allocations, accrual plans, and approval workflows.
examples: Set up an accrual allocation plan
Book leave on behalf of an employee

capabilities.name: Expenses
capabilities.description: Manage employee expenses, expense categories, sheets, approvals, and reimbursement.
examples: Create an expense sheet for reimbursement
Approve and post expenses to accounting

capabilities.name: Recruitment
capabilities.description: Manage job positions, applicants, recruitment stages, interviews, and offers.
examples: Move an applicant through recruitment stages
Refuse an applicant with a reason

capabilities.name: Appraisals
capabilities.description: Configure appraisal plans, feedback surveys, goals, and evaluation cycles with Enterprise hr_appraisal.

capabilities.name: Payroll Integration
capabilities.description: Understand payroll structures, salary rules, payslips, and payslip batches. Requires Enterprise.
examples: Create a payslip for an employee
